sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ الْحُصُولُ عَلَى مِنْحَةٍ دِرَاسِيَّةٍ كَامِلَةٍ حُلْماً لِكَثِيرٍ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ الطَّمُوحِينَ الَّذِينَ يَسْعَوْنَ لِتَوْسِيعِ آفَاقِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Dobijanje pune stipendije predstavlja san za mnoge ambiciozne studente koji teže proširenju svojih vidika.
sentences.translationEn: Obtaining a full scholarship represents a dream for many ambitious students who seek to broaden their horizons.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ الدِّرَاسَةُ فِي بَلَدٍ أَجْنَبِيٍّ فُرْصَةً فَرِيدَةً لِلِانْغِمَاسِ فِي ثَقَافَةٍ أَكَادِيمِيَّةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ وَمُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Studiranje u stranoj zemlji pruža jedinstvenu priliku za uranjanje u novu i drugačiju akademsku kulturu.
sentences.translationEn: Studying in a foreign country provides a unique opportunity to immerse oneself in a new and different academic culture.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُتَقَدِّمِينَ إِثْبَاتُ لَيْسَ فَقَطْ تَفَوُّقِهِمُ الدِّرَاسِيِّ، بَلْ أَيْضاً قُدُرَاتِهِمُ الْقِيَادِيَّةَ وَمُشَارَكَتَهُمُ الْمُجْتَمَعِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Kandidati moraju dokazati ne samo svoju akademsku izvrsnost, već i svoje liderske sposobnosti i društveni angažman.
sentences.translationEn: Applicants must demonstrate not only their academic excellence, but also their leadership abilities and community involvement.

sentences.arabic: قَدْ يَكُونُ التَّكَيُّفُ مَعَ نِظَامٍ تَعْلِيمِيٍّ مُغَايِرٍ أَمْراً مُرْهِقاً فِي الْبِدَايَةِ، لَكِنَّهُ يَبْنِي الِاسْتِقْلَالِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Prilagođavanje drugačijem obrazovnom sistemu može biti iscrpljujuće na početku, ali gradi samostalnost.
sentences.translationEn: Adapting to a different educational system can be exhausting at first, but it builds independence.

sentences.arabic: غَالِباً مَا تُمَهِّدُ هَذِهِ التَّجَارِبُ الدَّوْلِيَّةُ الطَّرِيقَ لِمِهَنٍ نَاجِحَةٍ فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ الْعَالَمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ova međunarodna iskustva često utiru put uspješnim karijerama na globalnom tržištu rada.
sentences.translationEn: These international experiences often pave the way for successful careers in the global labor market.
